productDisplayName: Salvatore Ferragamo Men Incanto Pour Homme Perfume
description: Style NoteIncanto Pour homme by salvatore ferragamo is a woody and musky fragrance for men. Created by Louise Turner, it has accents of artemisia, bamboo leaf, bitter orange, cypress, atlas cedar, bourbon geranium, vetiver, sandalwood and white musk. Quantity: 100 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
